rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 24, 2011, line 5. DEFENDANT WADE AUBRY, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must clearly and concisely plead facts stating a cause of action. Both causes of action must be pled in the same complaint, thus clarifying whether the 1st cause of action for medical negligence remains, and clearly set forth how, when, where, what, to whom the misrepresentation or cocealment occurred as to each defendant. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 24, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANT JONATHAN LEICHTLING, M.D. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - duplicate entry. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 24, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANTS IVAN BURGOS M.D., HERIBERTO OCASIO M.D.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend the 2nd, 3rd, 5th and 6th causes of action. The 2nd cause of action impermissibly alleges two distinct causes of action - wrongful death and negligent hiring. As to the 3rd cause of action, plaintiff must plead further facts of extreme conduct to support a gross negligence claim. Plaintiff must also plead more sufficient facts to support the 5th and 6th causes of action as to specific defendants. The demurrer to the 7th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. The demurrer as to the Estate's standing is sustained with leave to amend. Defendant must file amended complaint within 10 days of entry of order. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ESTATE OF FRANKLIN GOLDBERG AND JUNA GOLDBERG VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 24, 2011, line 6. DEFENDANTS SUTTER HEALTH, SUTTER WEST BAY HOSPITALS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' demurrer to 2nd cause of action overruled. Defendants' demurrer to 4th cause of action sustained with leave to amend to plead with more particularity the express contract between plaintiffs and defendant (not B & P 17500). Defendants' demurrer to 5th and 6th causes of action sustained with leave to amend to plead facts sufficient to constitute I.I.E.D. and N.I.E.D. as to these defendants. Demurrer to 7th cause of action sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff must file second amended complaint within 10 days of entry order. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREW S. PARK et al VS. R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, March 24, 2011, line 8. DEFENDANTS R.C. CHRONICLE BUILDING L.P., THE RITZ-CARLTON HOTEL COMPANY, LLC, THE RITZ-CARLTON DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON SALES COMPANY, INC., THE RITZ-CARLTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained as follows: As to the 1st, 2nd and 3rd causes of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts that show 1) the time and manner of discovery of misrepresentation/fraud, and 2) plaintiffs' inability to have made the discovery at an earlier date despite reasonable diligence. As to the 4th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts demonstrating a fiduciary duty owed by defendants. As to the 5th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead damages from defendants' purported breach. As to the 8th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend (see 1st, 2nd, 3rd causes of action). As to the 11th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Unconscionability is not a cause of action but a defense, and defendant was not a party to the contracts. As to the 13th causes of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant is not a trustee or beneficiary to the deed of trust or note. As to the 14th cause of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. As to the 16th and 17th causes of action, the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. =(302/LMG)
